overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a tan duster coat walking through a rural frontier town. The character travels from residential outskirts past a white church and cemetery, through the muddy main commercial street lined with saloons and shops, as light rain begins to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: outskirts of western town with wooden houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy path through the outskirts of town toward the church

entered.detail: wooden house with covered porch and stairs on the right side of the path
muddy dirt road with wagon wheel ruts running through the center
large leafy green tree on the left side of the path
white wooden church with steeple visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy dirt road through the outskirts of a Western town. Wooden houses line the path, and a large green tree stands on the left while a white church becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: church grounds with cemetery and tree canopy

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes from left to right across the path ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the path as a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving from left to right past the character

entered.detail: fenced cemetery grounds surrounding the church with grave markers
tall bare tree without leaves on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the white church with its surrounding cemetery on the left. A horse-drawn carriage passes by from left to right, and the large tree that was on the left now appears directly ahead as the character walks under its canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with saloon and doctor office

events.description: light rain begins to fall on the muddy street

agents.ego_description: walking down the main street of town past wooden storefronts and saloons

notable_agents.action: white wagon parked on the side of the muddy street

raised wooden sidewalk running along the front of the buildings
green-painted two-story building with ornate wooden balcony
wooden building with 'SMITH & SONS' and 'SALOON' signage
red and white striped barber pole outside the shop

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main commercial district with two-story wooden saloons and shops lining the muddy street. A white wagon is parked on the right, and rain begins to fall as the character passes the Smith & Sons saloon and a barber shop.

scene_state.functional_zone: western main street approaching livery stable in light rain

agents.ego_description: continuing down the muddy main street toward the livery stable while rain falls

notable_agents.action: horse grazing near the sidewalk on the left side of the street

entered.detail: large wooden livery stable building with double doors at the end of the street
wooden hitching posts for horses along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking through the light rain, the character continues down the main street toward a large livery stable at the end of the road. A horse grazes near the sidewalk on the left, and the Smith & Sons saloon recedes behind as the character approaches the stable entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the quiet residential outskirts of a frontier town into its bustling, rain-slicked commercial center. It begins along a muddy dirt road lined with wooden houses, moving toward a distant white church as a large green tree looms on the left. As the character passes the church and its adjacent cemetery, a horse-drawn carriage crosses the path before the camera glides under the canopy of the overarching tree. The scene then opens into the main district, where two-story saloons and shops line the street and a light rain begins to fall, blurring the view of a parked white wagon and the Smith & Sons saloon. Finally, the camera continues down the muddy thoroughfare past a grazing horse, leaving the shops behind as it approaches a large livery stable at the end of the road.
